journal.author: jime
journal.text: hI !! I have decided to make this website and update it weekly to keep in touch with pookie. It has two galleries — one for pictures of us, and a second one I update with descriptions. I'll also be adding prompts like would you rather and just goofy little questions. I hope this can keep our relationship fun as well as keep us connected. I love you so much anya <3

gallery_us.caption: add your first photo here! put the image file in the images/us/ folder, then replace this entry.

gallery_descriptions.title: our first entry
gallery_descriptions.description: this gallery is for memories with descriptions — add a title, a little story, and a date. no photo needed, just words.
gallery_descriptions.author: jime

prompts.question: spend a whole day exploring a new city together or stay in and do nothing but watch movies and eat snacks?
